identity.name: Brian Munroe
identity.title: Product Designer
identity.short_bio: Originally from Canada and now based in Boston, Brian transitioned from videography and podcast production into product design, with a focus on thoughtful AI-powered product experiences.

philosophy.design_philosophy: Balance user goals with business outcomes. Start with ambiguity, use research and customer insight to uncover pain points, then design solutions that are clear, useful, and impactful.

core_strengths: Balancing user needs with business goals
Comfort being wrong early, learning quickly, and pivoting
Zero-to-one product thinking with practical execution
working_style: Strong in zero-to-one work, and also comfortable improving existing products, refining features, and working within established design systems.

featured.name: SelexAI
featured.what_it_is: AI-assisted video editor designed to reduce post-production effort and turnaround time.
featured.who_it_is_for: Videographers and video editors handling long-form footage and interview-driven edits.
featured.why_it_matters: Cuts repetitive post-production work so editors can spend more time on creative decisions.
featured.role_scope: Owned user research, MVP definition, design system setup, and product iteration end to end.

deeper_details.key_challenge: Building trust in AI-generated interview highlights while fitting existing editorial workflows.
deeper_details.important_tradeoff: Scoped early work to interview-highlight extraction first for faster validation and lower implementation complexity.
deeper_details.outcome: Early testing with 6 user interviews and usability feedback indicated up to 30% editing time savings.

featured.name: Curio
featured.what_it_is: Concept project for Spotify onboarding using conversational AI to build tailored playlists.
featured.who_it_is_for: New music-streaming users who need faster personalization and early library creation.
featured.why_it_matters: Helps users build emotional connection to the product early, which can improve retention.
featured.role_scope: Owned product concept, research synthesis, interaction design, testing, and iteration.

deeper_details.key_challenge: Improving playlist setup speed and clarity without increasing onboarding friction.
deeper_details.important_tradeoff: Prioritized conversational flow over a more manual curation path after comparative testing.
deeper_details.outcome: Usability tests favored chat-based playlist creation for speed and completion.

secondary.name: BeThere
secondary.what_it_is: AI chatbot experience for social workers supporting youth exiting foster care.
secondary.who_it_is_for: Social workers and transitioning youth who need clearer support workflows.
secondary.why_it_matters: Aims to reduce social-worker burden while helping youth build confidence and independence.
secondary.role_scope: Owned design research and built the foundational design system with PM and engineering collaboration.

secondary.name: Eureka
secondary.what_it_is: Voice-first iOS app where users speak ideas and receive AI summaries with action plans.
secondary.who_it_is_for: People who think out loud and want to turn ideas into clear next steps quickly.
secondary.why_it_matters: Reduces friction between idea capture and execution.
secondary.role_scope: Owned problem framing, product design, design system, and functional build.

secondary.name: GetBettr
secondary.what_it_is: UX research and flow-clarity work for an AI startup.
secondary.who_it_is_for: Users who needed clearer messaging, content hierarchy, and onboarding flow.
secondary.why_it_matters: Improved comprehension and product guidance through structured research findings.
secondary.role_scope: Partnered on 15+ user interviews, synthesized insights, and collaborated with development to implement final designs.

secondary.name: Mezza
secondary.what_it_is: Digital menu UX redesign across 20+ franchise locations.
secondary.who_it_is_for: Customers ordering in high-volume environments and operators balancing speed with business goals.
secondary.why_it_matters: Improved clarity and decision flow in a fast-paced ordering context.
secondary.role_scope: Led end-to-end UX and visual design from research synthesis to high-fidelity UI and handoff.

items: Enjoying a patio on warm days

preferred_role_types: Product design roles with meaningful user impact
Collaborative teams with strong product and engineering partnership
Opportunities to blend research, systems thinking, and practical shipping
